mnemonics: SCARF (for key components: Storage, Compute, API, Resources, Fabric)
keyPoints: Compute Clouds provide on-demand virtualized resources like servers and processing power.
Storage Clouds offer scalable and durable data storage services, often object-based.
The architectural design relies heavily on virtualization, APIs, and a shared resource pool.
commonMistakes: Confusing IaaS (Infrastructure) with PaaS (Platform), assuming they offer the same level of control.
Assuming cloud storage is always a direct replacement for a traditional file system, ignoring its eventual consistency model.
Overlooking the critical role of the network 'fabric' that connects all cloud components, leading to performance bottlenecks.
